---
title: "test_harvest_responses_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_harvest_responses_empire.py"
loc: 23
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.27
style_score: 3.77
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.29
---

## Intent
The `test_harvest_responses_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_response_recorder_calls, test_response_recorder_save. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_response_recorder_calls, test_response_recorder_save. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 5 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [src.sentinel.harvest_responses](file://src.sentinel.harvest_responses)

### Exports
- `test_response_recorder_calls`
- `test_response_recorder_save`
